content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴，今日发布～欢迎大家收听、下载及分享～如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴
她猖獗、暴戾、喜怒无常，同时她亦宽仁、博学、充满智慧。
她是荒淫的暴君，也是羔羊的庇护者，她赐予你爱，也赐予你死。这片土地上的一切生灵都要匍匐在她的脚下，尊敬地高呼她的名号。
在女王的舞会上尽情沉醉吧，然后与她一起，沉入永恒的黑色火焰。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST：" Wanda EP: A Toast to Death" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST："Wanda EP: A Toast to Death"
She is wild, tyrannical, and mercurial. She is gracious, sagacious, and brimming with wisdom.
A depraved despot, yet a guardian of the lambs; she bestows love, and she delivers death.
All living things upon this land must kneel at her feet, reverently chanting her name.
Drown yourself in the Queen’s ball, and then descend with her into the eternal black flames.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴

content:
**01.掌管荒芜的女王-Queen of Desolation-**

很久很久以前，她是宇宙中独裁的帝王，一切所见的都归于她的御下。
很久很久以后，她的眼中只能看见漫无边际的尘埃，从此她所掌管的，只剩荒芜与寂寞。

Long, long ago, she was the sole monarch of the universe, and all that was seen bowed to her dominion.
Long, long after, her eyes beheld only endless dust, and all that remained in her grasp was desolation and silence.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴

content:
**02.湖中倒影-Reflection in the Lake-**

她总在湖中看到辉煌的旧日。
风化的记忆如虚假的梦境，梦里她坐在无边废墟之中，目睹属于她的一切都如幻影一般模糊消散。
在连那个梦境也将被忘记的时候，吹笛的使者穿过迷雾而来，引领她走向逝去之人的归途。

Wanda would see her glorious past reflected in the lake.
Her memories have been fading into false dreams: visions of herself seated amidst infinite ruins, watching all that was hers dissolve like phantoms.
And when even that dream is on the verge of dissolving away, the flute-playing envoy emerges from the mist, guiding her toward the path of the departed.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴

content:
**03.瘟疫的假面-Masquerade with Plague-**

假如死前只能做最后一件事，那就跳舞吧。
饮下甘醇的美酒，咽下香甜的煎肉，在狂欢的乐曲中尽情飞旋。
要这世界在眼中最后的倒影，仍闪烁着迷醉的金光。

If but one final act remains before the end, she muses, let it be a dance. Let me drain the sweetest wine, feast on spiced flesh, and spin until the world dissolves into gilded delirium.
She demands this much: when the world comes to an end, let its last reflection in her eyes a shimmering haze of gold.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴

content:
**04.红酒、鲜花与华丽之死-Wine, Flowers, and Glorious Death-**

癫狂的死状如万花筒般回旋，源自疾病与尸体的腥甜气息是最好的熏香，你们隔着无数赴死之人遥遥举杯——若死亡是注定，就让我们欢欣地奔赴这场舞会，在舞步的最后一拍共同坠入地狱的大门。

The frenzied whirl in kaleidoscope frenzy: that sweet rot of plague and corpses their sacred perfume.
Across a sea of the doomed, you raise your glass in a toast to her:
If death is inevitable, then let us gladly waltz into its embrace; at the dance’s final step, we shall fall together through the waiting jaws of hell.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴
